releaseNotes:
v0.24.4 — Settings menu compression follow-up.

Camera scanner toggle and other sections (Thresholds, Audit, Zones, Return Manifest) previously had multi-line explanatory paragraphs that pushed real controls below the fold. Moved the explanations behind tap-to-reveal info icons in the section headers. Estimated 200-250px of vertical space saved on a phone screen. Same controls, same behavior, just more compact.

Includes everything from v0.24.0 through v0.24.3: Windows .exe installer, save-to-file support bundle, delete-in-error button, multi-device docs, Android Auto Backup off, in-app DB reset for recovery from open_failed errors.
